rows.label: qev015703_MSG0001
rows.name: Did you find that Whim Guila bastard?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0002
rows.name:
If you're having trouble running into
it when you're actively searching, your
devil's luck is truly something else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0003
rows.name:
If you steadily retrace the route,
you're bound to run into it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0004
rows.name:
Find it quickly and
send it flying for me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0005
rows.name:
How'd it go? Did you send
the Whim Guila flying?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0006
rows.name:
Well, judging by that confident
look on your face...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0007
rows.name:
And more importantly, the fact that you
returned to me looking so composed[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0008
rows.name:
clearly tells the tale
of a good outcome![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0009
rows.name:
Impressive! With this, the
route is secured, and my
frustration is cleared up, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0010
rows.name: Let me thank you again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0011
rows.name:
While you were fighting, I practically
finished repairing the Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0012
rows.name:
Thanks to you, it looks like
we can get back to work without
losing too much time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0013
rows.name:
We'll quickly install Data Probes at
the Frontier Net Spots around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0014
rows.name:
We've got to gather information
on the native creatures so there
aren't any more victims like us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_JNK0010
rows.name: Support[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_SEL0011
rows.name: Encourage them to continue doing their best on the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_JNK0020
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about the Frontier Net Spots.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0015
rows.name: Yeah! Thanks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0016
rows.name:
Pathfinders are a Union filled with
elites even among BLADE, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0017
rows.name:
Average guys like me have to work many times harder
than others just to keep up. I'll quickly fix the
Doll and get back to the exploration mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0018
rows.name:
There's one by the shore of a lake
just a little northwest from here[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0019
rows.name:
And I also heard there's a likely
spot inside a cave to the northeast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0020
rows.name:
If things hadn't turned out like
this, I was hoping to make them
our achievements, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0021
rows.name:
If you're willing to go that far, I'll
leave them to you. Be careful out there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0022
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Phew, even so, getting beaten
by a monster like this really
makes you realize...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0023
rows.name:
We've crashed down onto an
absolutely outrageous planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0024
rows.name:
From now on, we have to keep
fighting opponents that can
easily destroy even a Doll...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0025
rows.name:
If we don't act much more
carefully and cautiously, we
won't have enough lives to spare.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0026
rows.name:
I'll brace myself from now on to make
sure I don't make a blunder like this
again, and focus on the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015703_MSG0027
rows.name:
You do your best, too, alright? Let's both
survive, and survive, and survive... and watch
over the fate of humanity until the very end![ST:wait ]
